title: Best Hotels in Chiang Rai Thailand (2026)
meta_description: The best hotels in Chiang Rai for 2026, from night-bazaar-side city bases to Kok River resorts that make temple days and northern excursions easier.
intro: Chiang Rai hotel choice is mostly about whether you want walkable evenings in the center or a fuller riverfront resort base. These hotels make Chiang Rai's geography easier instead of harder.

items.name: The Riverie by Katathani
items.description: The strongest resort-style base in Chiang Rai if you want Kok River space, facilities, and a hotel that can carry part of the trip on its own.
highlights: Useful if hotel comfort matters a lot
items.current_info: Best for travelers who want Chiang Rai's sightseeing with a real resort base rather than only a room in the center.

items.name: Le Patta Chiang Rai Hotel
items.description: A strong city-center stay near the night bazaar and central walking area, ideal for first-time visitors who care about evenings on foot.
items.current_info: A smart choice when you want Chiang Rai to feel like a city stay instead of a resort retreat.

items.name: The Legend Chiang Rai
items.description: A river-oriented resort stay that balances greenery and quieter nights with usable access to central Chiang Rai.
items.current_info: Best if you want resort atmosphere but do not want to feel cut off from the city.

items.name: Riva Vista Riverfront Resort Chiang Rai
items.description: A polished newer riverfront option for travelers who want a contemporary stay, Kok River views, and on-site dining.
items.current_info: A useful fit for shorter couple trips or comfort-led Chiang Rai stays.

items.name: Le Meridien Chiang Rai Resort
items.description: A polished international-brand river resort when you want full-service standards and do not mind paying for a more conventional upscale format.
highlights: Works well with private day touring
items.current_info: A good fit if you want a familiar luxury structure around a Chiang Rai sightseeing plan.

items.name: The Imperial River House Resort
items.description: A defensible river-area value alternative from the official Chiang Rai accommodation list for travelers who want location and easier pricing.
items.current_info: Best when you want the Kok River zone without committing to the highest-end resort tier.
